name: Neon
description: Glowing tube segments rearranging themselves on a dark wall — each redraw re-aims the lights and re-mixes their halos.

code.style: --ang: @p(0deg, 45deg, 90deg, 135deg); --rule: ( /* tube and both halos share one emitted color */ --tube: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { transform: rotate(var(--ang)); :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 14%; top: 47%; width: 72%; height: 6%; border-radius: 99px; background: @var(--tube); box-shadow: 0 0 calc(80px / @Y) @var(--tube), 0 0 calc(200px / @Y) @var(--tube); transition: ease 500ms; } } transition: ease 500ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
